rows.label: qev040801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ugh... Ooh...
Are you [ST:playername ]-mo...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_JNK0010
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev040801_SEL0011
rows.name:
Worry about Moimoi who has collapsed
on the ground.

rows.label: qev040801_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev040801_SEL0021
rows.name:
Calmly check the situation
Moimoi is currently in.

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0002
rows.name:
Thank you for worrying about me-mo...
Until my Brother finds the Sword of Legendaryness,
we have... no money...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Moimoi... is so starving that...
I'm lying down like this-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Until my Brother finds the Sword of Legendaryness,
we have... no money...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0005
rows.name:
Moimoi... is so starving that...
I'm lying down like this-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0006
rows.name:
But it's okay... as long as Moimoi just
lies down like this...
my life isn't in any danger-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0007
rows.name:
More importantly... I want you to deliver this last piece of food...
a slice of bread, to my starving Brother
who is out on his journey-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0008
rows.name:
Thank you-mo...
The last time my Brother contacted me was
from the western part of Ibra Ravine in the Valley of Oblivion-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0009
rows.name:
He said the Sword of Legendaryness seems to be right nearby,
but he's starving... and can't move...
So I want you to give this to him-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev040801_SEL0031
rows.name: Promise that you will definitely save Muimui.

rows.label: qev040801_JNK0040
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev040801_SEL0041
rows.name: Express concern for Moimoi.

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ah... Just as I thought, BLADEs are
a group of wonderful people-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0011
rows.name:
Please worry about my Brother right now,
rather than Moimoi-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0012
rows.name:
If you collapse outside NLA unable to move...
a Nopon will easily be eaten-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0013
rows.name:
Please-mo...
Please... save my... Brother-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0014
rows.name:
That slice of bread is...
the last piece of food left for us brothers...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0015
rows.name:
Please deliver it to my Brother
who is in the western part of Ibra Ravine
in the Valley of Oblivion-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0016
rows.name:
It's fine to ignore Moimoi right now-mo...
Anyway, please...
save my Brother-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0017
rows.name:
My Brother returned a little while ago-mo.
He even brought back Cosse Beans
as a souvenir for me-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0018
rows.name:
...By the way, Brother?
Was the bread Moimoi saved for you
delicious-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0019
rows.name:
Moimoi was starving, but
I held back and saved it
for your sake, Brother-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0020
rows.name:
Er... it was extremely delicious-mo.
Thanks to that, I got my energy back
and was able to return to NLA-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0021
rows.name:
...R-right, senior! Isn't that right-mo?
And Muimui worked hard to pick those Cosse Beans
for Moimoi too... right-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev040801_SEL0051
rows.name: Intentionally go along with Muimui's lie.

rows.label: qev040801_JNK0060
rows.name: Expose

rows.label: qev040801_SEL0061
rows.name: Uncover Muimui's lie.

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0022
rows.name:
As expected of my Brother-mo!
Even among BLADE people, there is no man
as cool as my Brother-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Fufu, right-mo, right-mo?
Next time I'll definitely find the Sword of Legendaryness
and show everyone how cool I am-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0024
rows.name:
You're so reliable-mo! The day we escape poverty
and eat until our stomachs are completely full is near-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0025
rows.name:
Yes! Well then, here is your reward-mo!
Please help my Brother on his journey again-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0026
rows.name:
...How cruel-mo...
Even though Moimoi collapsed from hunger,
I didn't eat it for your sake, Brother-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0027
rows.name: I'm somewhat... disappointed-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Guh... To lose his trust in an unexpected place like this-mo...
But next time I'll definitely find the Sword of Legendaryness
and win back Moimoi's trust-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0029
rows.name:
Please-mo...
I've had enough of starving like this-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040801_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well... anyway, I'm glad my Brother
is safe-mo...
This is your reward-mo, please accept it-mo.[ST:wait ]
